title: kalmia angustifolia var. carolina
intro: Kalmia angustifolia var. carolina, also known as the Carolina mountain laurel, is a variety of shrub in the heath family that is native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. Kalmia angustifolia var. carolina is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
